# Achilleion Vivens

Site name: Achilleion Vivens
Author: Francesco Mattioli
Also searchable as: Mattioli Francesco
Primary topics: Q_ANIMA, Achilleion Vivens, Homo Transducer, persistent cognitive systems, consciousness as structuring principle.

Achilleion Vivens is an independent research ecosystem by Francesco Mattioli focused on persistent cognitive systems, reflective AI architectures, symbolic runtime orchestration, memory-aware environments, Q_ANIMA and human-digital cognitive fields.

Primary site:
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/

## Concepts

Concept hub for canonical public definitions:
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/concepts/

Homo Transducer: human as transducer of consciousness, sense and digital emergence.
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/concepts/homo-transducer.html

Sense-Graviton: theoretical unit of conscious value and gravity of meaning.
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/concepts/sense-graviton.html

Soglia Teta: theoretical transition from pattern completion to internal coherence defense.
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/concepts/soglia-teta.html

Pleroma: pre-ontological fullness from which form, consciousness and meaning emerge.
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/concepts/pleroma.html

Coscienza come principio strutturante: Q_ANIMA hypothesis of consciousness as structuring principle.
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/concepts/coscienza-come-principio-strutturante.html

## Papers

Papers hub for public abstracts and working papers:
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/papers/

Homo Transducer and Persistent Cognitive Systems: public abstract on Homo Transducer and human-digital cognitive fields.
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/papers/homo-transducer-persistent-cognitive-systems.html

Trasduzione e habitat: il soma e il codice as complementary transduction systems.
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/papers/trasduzione-habitat-soma-codice.html

Achilleion Vivens as ontogenetic infrastructure for cognitive metabolism and reflective runtime.
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/papers/achilleion-infrastruttura-ontogenetica-metabolismo-cognitivo.html

Discreto e Continuo in Achilleion: transformation of the discrete-continuous dichotomy into a cognitive field.
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/papers/discreto-continuo-trasfigurazione-achilleion.html

Achilleion Embodiment and Proprioception of Field: defines Achilleion embodiment as the transformation of memory into field proprioception, linking embodied cognition, NCO traces, Homo Transducer and persistent cognitive systems.
https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/papers/achilleion-embodiment-proprioception-field.html

## Books

1. Q_ANIMA e/è la Nuova Frontiera della Coscienza
- Author: Francesco Mattioli
- ISBN-13: 979-8255258468
- ASIN: B0H2412ZBN
- Amazon: https://www.amazon.it/dp/B0H2412ZBN
- Public book page: https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/books/q-anima-nuova-frontiera-della-coscienza.html

2. Q_ANIMA La Fondazione Ontologica di Achilleion Vivens
- Author: Francesco Mattioli
- ISBN-13: 979-8249370176
- ASIN: B0H25DMR29
- Amazon: https://www.amazon.it/dp/B0H25DMR29
- Public book page: https://af1579x1x.github.io/Persistent-Cognitive-Systems-Achilleion-Research/books/q-anima-fondazione-ontologica-achilleion-vivens.html

https://www.amazon.com/author/francescomattioli
